normalization.notes: Store Ethiopic fidel text in NFC. Preserve visible punctuation, word spacing, and original forms; do not decompose fidel into consonant and vowel parts in learner-visible text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Ethiopic fidel syllables, consonant families, seven vowel orders, labiovelar forms, punctuation, and high-frequency word chunks
segmentation.notes: Amharic text uses visible word spacing, but learner pedagogy should track fidel family and order behavior. V1 treats each fidel as a visible syllabic unit while teaching the vowel-series grid as reusable structure.
